_about: Example config for non-interactive init: python3 scripts/init.py --non-interactive --config researchpartner.config.example.json . Keys starting with _ are ignored. All values are strings ('yes'/'no' for toggles). The GSAD project that this template was generalized from would set PROJECT_NAME=GSAD, USER_NAME=Hiroki, CHAT_LANG=Japanese, EXPERIMENT_UNIT_LABEL=Wave, ANALYSIS_RECORD_LABEL=Theme, COMPUTE_ENV=colab.
_lang: CHAT_LANG / DOCS_LANG / CODE_LANG may differ. Docs are language-agnostic (any Unicode script; Greek math letters are fine). A non-English DOCS_LANG seeds a one-time localization offer -- the skeleton always ships in English.
_paths: Working location (absolute paths). FRAMEWORK_REPO_DIR defaults to this clone's own directory if omitted.
_compute: colab | local-gpu | local-cpu | other. COMPUTE_DRIVE is required only when COMPUTE_ENV=colab.
_subsystems: Toggle the optional subsystems. init no longer asks any of these: SRC_MIRROR_ENABLED is auto-enabled when PROJECT_ROOT/src exists; GENERATE_MANUAL and ENABLE_AUTO_MODE default to 'yes'. ENABLE_PUBLISH_STEP defaults to 'yes': generated prompts end with a Publish step (commit + push the docs repo AFTER the task's verification; with SRC_MIRROR_ENABLED it also mirrors src). It assumes you completed the one-time origin setup (README step 4). Set it to 'no' to keep commit/push manual.
_vocabulary: User-facing labels. GSAD used Wave / Theme.
_vars: Optional shell-var-name overrides. Leave blank to derive from PROJECT_NAME as <NAME>_ROOT / <NAME>_DOCS / <NAME>_DRIVE. Set them to keep an existing project's established names (e.g. REPO_VAR=AI_SCIENTIST_GSAD). Must be UPPER_SNAKE.
_intent: Only used to seed status/concept docs when the workspace has no code yet. Leave empty otherwise.
